items.original_text: i am excited to see what will happen with tokenmaxxing startups, both for how they work internally and the products they can build. openai offered to invest $2M in tokens into every startup in the current yc batch. happy building! Tyler Bosmeny: A mic drop moment @ycombinator tonight @sama just offered $2M in OpenAI tokens to EVERY YC startup in the current batch in exchange for equity Just like Yuri Milner offering to invest in every startup back when Sam was a YC partner I can't wait to see what's unlocked when you
items.zh_text: 我很期待看到 tokenmaxxing 初创公司的发展，无论是它们内部运作的方式，还是它们能够构建的产品。OpenAI 提出向当前 YC 批次中的每家初创公司投资 200 万美元的 tokens。祝大家建设愉快！Tyler Bosmeny：今晚在 @ycombinator 的震撼时刻，@sama 刚刚提出向当前批次中的每家 YC 初创公司提供 200 万美元的 OpenAI tokens，以换取股权。就像当年 Sam 还是 YC 合伙人时 Yuri Milner 提出投资每家初创公司一样。我迫不及待想看到当这一切解锁时会发生什么。

items.original_text: Having out of body experience right now AMA. Taylor Lorenz: 3.5M views/167k likes on a completely false anti data center conspiracy theory. An external construction crew struck an underground power line, which is what led to power loss, but people continue to fall for anti data center conspiracies.
items.zh_text: 此刻正在经历灵魂出窍的体验，欢迎提问。泰勒·洛伦兹：一个完全虚假的反数据中心阴谋论获得了350万次观看和16.7万次点赞。实际上，是外部施工队挖断了地下电力线，这才导致断电，但人们仍然继续相信反数据中心的阴谋论。

items.original_text: Introducing OpenAI Guaranteed Capacity: a new offering that enables customers to guarantee long-term access to OpenAI compute. We’ve made long-term investments in infrastructure, partnerships, and capacity planning to help customers scale reliably. Now, Guaranteed Capacity helps customers plan ahead for critical workloads in a compute-constrained world. http://openai.com/guaranteed-capacity
items.zh_text: OpenAI 推出保障容量服务：一项新服务，让客户能够确保长期使用 OpenAI 的计算资源。我们在基础设施、合作伙伴关系和容量规划方面进行了长期投资，以帮助客户可靠地扩展。现在，保障容量服务帮助客户在计算资源受限的环境中提前规划关键工作负载。

items.original_text: We’re adding new ways for people to identify AI-generated images and understand where they came from. In addition to C2PA Content Credentials, images now also contain a SynthID watermark, and can be identified using a public verification tool to check whether an image was made by OpenAI products. https://openai.com/index/advancing-content-provenance/
items.zh_text: 我们正在增加新的方式，让人们识别AI生成的图像并了解其来源。除了C2PA内容凭证外，图像现在还包含SynthID水印，并且可以使用公开验证工具来检查图像是否由OpenAI产品生成。

items.original_text: the team is doing great work on agentic security Fotis Chantzis: Proud to see our work on agent security @openai highlighted in Forbes. Securing AI agents means bringing identity, credential, and access controls directly into the developer workflow, and Codex is a major step in that direction. https://www.forbes.com/sites/timkeary/2026/05/19/openai-and-1password-bring-password-security-to-codex/
items.zh_text: 团队在智能体安全方面做得非常出色。Fotis Chantzis：很自豪看到我们在OpenAI的智能体安全工作被《福布斯》报道。保护AI智能体意味着将身份、凭证和访问控制直接融入开发者工作流，而Codex正是朝着这一方向迈出的重要一步。https://www.forbes.com/sites/timkeary/2026/05/19/openai-and-1password-bring-password-security-to-codex/

items.original_text: RT Pushmeet Kohli The results of the research happening in my team @GoogleDeepMind have convinced me that the next era of scientific discovery will be aided by AI agents acting as force multipliers for human ingenuity. That’s why I’m proud to introduce Gemini for Science - a collection of experimental science tools designed to support researchers at every stage of the research process. The tools include: 1️⃣ Literature Insights, built with Google NotebookLM, searches millions of scientific papers to synthesize findings and generate artifacts including data tables, slides, reports, and more. 2️⃣ Hypothesis Generation, built with Co-Scientist, simulates the scientific method via a multi-agent "idea tournament" to generate, debate, and rigorously evaluate research hypotheses. 3️⃣Computational Discovery, built with AlphaEvolve and ERA, is an agentic engine that generates and scores thousands of code variations in parallel, allowing researchers to test modeling approaches in fields like epidemiology in a fraction of the usual time. Read more: https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/research/gemini-for-science-io-2026/ Register for access here: http://labs.google/science
items.zh_text: 转发 Pushmeet Kohli：我在 @GoogleDeepMind 团队的研究成果让我确信，科学发现的下一时代将由 AI 智能体助力，它们将成为人类创造力的倍增器。因此，我很自豪地推出 Gemini for Science——一套实验性科学工具，旨在支持研究者在研究过程的每个阶段。这些工具包括：1️⃣ 文献洞察（Literature Insights），基于 Google NotebookLM 构建，可搜索数百万篇科学论文，综合发现并生成数据表、幻灯片、报告等成果。2️⃣ 假设生成（Hypothesis Generation），基于 Co-Scientist 构建，通过多智能体“创意锦标赛”模拟科学方法，以生成、辩论并严格评估研究假设。3️⃣ 计算发现（Computational Discovery），基于 AlphaEvolve 和 ERA 构建，是一个智能体引擎，可并行生成并评分数千种代码变体，使研究者能够在流行病学等领域以通常时间的一小部分测试建模方法。了解更多：https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/research/gemini-for-science-io-2026/ 注册访问：http://labs.google/science

items.original_text: We’re shipping a CDN pricing model that “smooths over” traffic spikes and viral events. This allows us to remove stress and surprises, with uncompromising quality and network performance. Predictability without slow routes, degraded PoPs, or priority bandwidth tiers. Vercel Developers: Flat Rate CDN is in Limited Beta for Pro teams. You pay a fixed monthly fee for Vercel CDN usage, with no overages for viral spikes, unfiltered bots, or misconfigured routes. Join the waitlist ↓https://vercel.com/changelog/flat-rate-cdn-in-limited-beta
items.zh_text: 我们正在推出一种能够“平滑”流量高峰和病毒式传播事件的CDN定价模式。这使我们能够在保持无妥协的质量和网络性能的同时，消除压力和意外。可预测性，无需慢速路由、降级PoP或优先级带宽层级。Vercel开发者：Pro团队的固定费率CDN现已进入有限测试阶段。您为Vercel CDN使用支付固定月费，无需为病毒式传播高峰、未过滤的机器人或配置错误的路由支付额外费用。加入等待列表 ↓https://vercel.com/changelog/flat-rate-cdn-in-limited-beta

items.original_text: RT Daniel Jeffries Finally a semi-useful read on Mythos that is free of myth and talks about what this means more practically (not this is the end of the world as we know it, but how do we deal with faster patches and attacks from AI as other models scale to chained exploits)? This is the kind of conversation we need, not idiotic ones about the end of all software. We need "what is the right answer?" because these models are coming and will get better so how to we put our heads together and make better/more secure software across the world? And it can't just be patching the 100 or so projects that got access to Project Glasswing. That is not gonna help the world. We need to figure out how does everyone else who is not part of the special chosen people to get blessed with access to test and patch their stuff, aka the open source projects and closed software that is not Office or Cloudflare but the 99.99% of software that runs everything else in the world? What is the right loop cycle to help people patch and fix things at the source? In the long run, AI will make software more secure, not less. But it will change how teams have to work to get there. Figuring that out means putting it in more team's hands sooner rather than later. Cloudflare: Cloudflare's security team spent the last few weeks testing Anthropic's Mythos against fifty of our own repositories. What we learned about offensive AI, why faster patching is the wrong reaction, and what the architecture around vulnerabilities has to look like next.
items.zh_text: Yann LeCun 转发了 Daniel Jeffries 的推文：终于有一篇关于 Mythos 的半实用读物，它没有神话色彩，而是更实际地讨论了这意味着什么（不是“世界末日”，而是当其他模型扩展到连锁攻击时，我们如何应对更快的补丁和来自 AI 的攻击）？这才是我们需要的对话，而不是那些关于所有软件终结的愚蠢言论。我们需要“正确答案是什么？”因为这些模型正在到来，并且会变得更好，所以我们如何集思广益，在全球范围内制作更好/更安全的软件？而且这不能仅仅修补获得 Project Glasswing 访问权限的 100 多个项目。这对世界没有帮助。我们需要弄清楚，那些不属于被特别选中、有幸获得访问权限来测试和修补自己东西的其他人——也就是那些开源项目和不是 Office 或 Cloudflare 的闭源软件，而是运行世界上其他一切的 99.99% 的软件——该怎么办？什么是正确的循环周期，帮助人们从源头修补和修复问题？从长远来看，AI 将使软件更安全，而不是更不安全。但这将改变团队实现这一目标的工作方式。弄清楚这一点意味着要尽早将这一能力交到更多团队手中。Cloudflare：Cloudflare 的安全团队在过去几周里，针对我们自己的 50 个代码仓库测试了 Anthropic 的 Mythos。我们学到了关于进攻性 AI 的知识，为什么更快的补丁是错误的反应，以及围绕漏洞的架构接下来必须是什么样子。

items.original_text: RT Andrew Weinstein When a federal agency tasked with protecting all Americans decides to mandate a specific religious worldview, it ceases to protect democracy and begins to threaten it.

items.original_text: RT nic carter Re This is the single most important chart. If AI were driving prices, you'd see a cluster top-right. You don't. States with huge load growth (VA, TX, NV, ND, IA) sit at ~0c change in 5y. States with massive price hikes (CA, NY, MA, CT) have basically NO load growth.
items.zh_text: 转发 @nic carter 回复 这是唯一最重要的图表。如果人工智能在推动价格上涨，你会看到右上角有一个集群。但事实并非如此。负荷大幅增长的州（弗吉尼亚州、得克萨斯州、内华达州、北达科他州、爱荷华州）5年内的电价变化约为0美分。而电价大幅上涨的州（加利福尼亚州、纽约州、马萨诸塞州、康涅狄格州）基本上没有负荷增长。

items.original_text: We've published a paper that explains our views on AI competition between the US and China. The US and democratic allies hold the lead in frontier AI today. Read more on what it’ll take to keep that lead: https://www.anthropic.com/research/2028-ai-leadership
items.zh_text: 我们发表了一篇论文，阐述了对中美AI竞争的看法。美国及其民主盟友目前在尖端AI领域保持领先。了解更多关于如何保持这一领先地位的信息：https://www.anthropic.com/research/2028-ai-leadership

items.original_text: RT David Weston (DWIZZZLE) http://cybergym.io just updated its leaderboard and MDASH is now #1 using a new multi-model approach. Huge credit to Taesoo Kim and the Autonomous Code Security team for pushing the frontier on AI-driven vulnerability discovery and defense https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2026/05/12/defense-at-ai-speed-microsofts-new-multi-model-agentic-security-system-tops-leading-industry-benchmark/
items.zh_text: 转推 David Weston (DWIZZZLE)：http://cybergym.io 刚刚更新了排行榜，MDASH 现在凭借一种新的多模型方法跃居第一。非常感谢 Taesoo Kim 和自主代码安全团队在推动人工智能驱动的漏洞发现与防御前沿方面所做的贡献。

items.original_text: Our new multi-model agentic security system brings together more than 100 specialized agents across frontier and custom models to find exploitable bugs, delivering top performance on the CyberGym benchmark. We used it ahead of Patch Tuesday to help find and fix 16 vulnerabilities. Today we’re announcing that customers can sign up to test it in private preview. https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2026/05/12/defense-at-ai-speed-microsofts-new-multi-model-agentic-security-system-tops-leading-industry-benchmark/?v=1
items.zh_text: 我们的新型多模型智能体安全系统整合了前沿模型与定制模型中的100多个专业智能体，用于发现可利用漏洞，在CyberGym基准测试中取得了顶级性能。我们在补丁星期二之前使用该系统帮助发现并修复了16个漏洞。今天，我们宣布客户可以注册在私人预览版中测试该系统。

items.original_text: PayPal runs 74,000 weekly tasks in Perplexity Enterprise. Teams use it for model validation, channel performance, market trend research, competitive intelligence, and product analysis. Read the customer story: https://www.perplexity.ai/enterprise/customers/paypal
items.zh_text: PayPal 每周在 Perplexity Enterprise 上运行 74,000 个任务。团队将其用于模型验证、渠道表现、市场趋势研究、竞争情报和产品分析。阅读客户案例：https://www.perplexity.ai/enterprise/customers/paypal

items.original_text: This works really well btw, at the end of your query ask your LLM to "structure your response as HTML", then view the generated file in your browser. I've also had some success asking the LLM to present its output as slideshows, etc. More generally, imo audio is the human-preferred input to AIs but vision (images/animations/video) is the preferred output from them. Around a ~third of our brains are a massively parallel processor dedicated to vision, it is the 10-lane superhighway of information into brain. As AI improves, I think we'll see a progression that takes advantage: 1) raw text (hard/effortful to read) 2) markdown (bold, italic, headings, tables, a bit easier on the eyes) <-- current default 3) HTML (still procedural with underlying code, but a lot more flexibility on the graphics, layout, even interactivity) <-- early but forming new good default ...4,5,6,... n) interactive neural videos/simulations Imo the extrapolation (though the technology doesn't exist just yet) ends in some kind of interactive videos generated directly by a diffusion neural net. Many open questions as to how exact/procedural "Software 1.0" artifacts (e.g. interactive simulations) may be woven together with neural artifacts (diffusion grids), but generally something in the direction of the recently viral https://x.com/zan2434/status/2046982383430496444 There are also improvements necessary and pending at the input. Audio nor text nor video alone are not enough, e.g. I feel a need to point/gesture to things on the screen, similar to all the things you would do with a person physically next to you and your computer screen. TLDR The input/output mind meld between humans and AIs is ongoing and there is a lot of work to do and significant progress to be made, way before jumping all the way into neuralink-esque BCIs and all that. For what's worth exploring at the current stage, hot tip try ask for HTML. Thariq: http://x.com/i/article/2052796100608974848
items.zh_text: 顺便说一句，这个方法效果很好：在提问结束时，让大语言模型“以 HTML 格式组织回答”，然后在浏览器中查看生成的文件。我还曾成功让大语言模型以幻灯片等形式呈现输出。更广泛地说，我认为音频是人类偏好的 AI 输入方式，而视觉（图像/动画/视频）则是偏好的输出方式。我们大脑中大约三分之一是专门处理视觉的大规模并行处理器，它是信息进入大脑的十车道高速公路。随着 AI 的进步，我认为我们会看到一系列利用这一优势的演进：1）纯文本（阅读起来费力/费劲）2）Markdown（粗体、斜体、标题、表格，对眼睛稍微友好一些）<-- 当前默认 3）HTML（仍然有底层代码的过程性，但在图形、布局甚至交互性上灵活得多）<-- 早期但正在形成新的良好默认值 ...4,5,6,... n）交互式神经视频/模拟。我认为外推（尽管技术尚未存在）最终会走向由扩散神经网络直接生成的某种交互式视频。关于“软件 1.0”制品（例如交互式模拟）如何与神经制品（扩散网格）精确/过程性地交织在一起，还有许多悬而未决的问题，但总体方向类似于最近爆火的 https://x.com/zan2434/status/2046982383430496444。输入方面也有必要且待进行的改进。仅靠音频、文本或视频都不够，例如，我觉得需要指向/手势屏幕上的内容，就像你与一个物理上在你旁边的人以及你的电脑屏幕所做的一切。简而言之，人类与 AI 之间的输入/输出思维融合正在进行中，还有很多工作要做，并且需要取得重大进展，远在直接跳入 Neuralink 式的脑机接口等之前。就当前阶段值得探索的内容而言，一个小窍门是尝试要求 HTML。Thariq：http://x.com/i/article/2052796100608974848

items.original_text: Excel has quietly been Turing complete for a long time. Nice to see it now edging toward "AI complete"—SGD, attention, next-token prediction… all in cells. Austin Henley: Excel Copilot one-shotted a tiny GPT-style language model for me inside a spreadsheet: embeddings, causal attention, weights trained with stochastic gradient descent, next-token prediction, and a live slider to watch it learn.
items.zh_text: Excel 早已悄然图灵完备。如今它正迈向“AI 完备”——随机梯度下降、注意力机制、下一个词元预测……全在单元格里实现，令人欣喜。Austin Henley：Excel Copilot 在电子表格中为我一次性构建了一个微型的 GPT 风格语言模型：嵌入层、因果注意力、通过随机梯度下降训练的权重、下一个词元预测，以及一个实时滑块来观察学习过程。

items.original_text: This is the the quote I've been citing a lot recently. kache: you can outsource your thinking but you cannot outsource your understanding
items.zh_text: 这是我最近经常引用的一句话。kache：你可以外包你的思考，但你不能外包你的理解。
